de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.io

Class AbstractEnvInput

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.io.AbstractEnvInput
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    EnvInput
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    EmptyEnvInput, SLEnvInput

    public abstract class AbstractEnvInput
extends java.lang.Object
implements EnvInput
    A simple EnvInput which includes default rules and a Java path.

      Modifier and Type Method and Description

      Returns the file path to specific requested Java file.

      Returns the total numbers of chars that can be read in this input.

      Returns the Profile to use.

        public final void setInitConfig(InitConfig initConfig)

        Sets the initial configuration the read environment input should be added to. Must be called before calling any of the read* methods.

        setInitConfig in interface EnvInput

      • setIgnoreOtherJavaFiles

        public void setIgnoreOtherJavaFiles(boolean ignoreOtherJavaFiles)

      • isIgnoreOtherJavaFiles

        public boolean isIgnoreOtherJavaFiles()
        Description copied from interface: EnvInput
        This flag determines whether the given path to the Java source should be considered as a classpath, or just the Java file without other files should be loaded.

        Default is false.

        If true, the requested Java file has to given via EnvInput.getJavaFile().

        Specified by:
        isIgnoreOtherJavaFiles in interface EnvInput
        See Also:
        ProblemInitializer.readJava(EnvInput, InitConfig)

      • getJavaFile

        public java.lang.String getJavaFile()
        Description copied from interface: EnvInput
        Returns the file path to specific requested Java file.
        Specified by:
        getJavaFile in interface EnvInput
        See Also:
        EnvInput.isIgnoreOtherJavaFiles()
